privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real data from the RCSB Protein Data Bank, explicitly downloading the PDB structure 1STP. An independent calculation of polar contacts within 3.5 Angstroms confirms that the exact expected first-shell hydrogen-bonding residues between Streptavidin and the Biotin ligand (BTN) are 23, 27, 43, 45, 49, 88, 90, and 128. Output paths and parameter bounds for figure size, report lines, and residue count match the verifier logic.
